new.name: CVE-2026-41089-LongLogon
new.description: CVE-2026-41089 checker: unauthenticated, non-destructive detection for the Netlogon CLDAP stack buffer overflow (CVSS 9.8). Reports whether a domain controller's domain is long enough to crash, without sending the overflow. The binary-verified analysis the public PoCs got wrong.

update.name: CVE-2021-4034
update.description: Advanced Linux Privilege Escalation research on CVE-2021-4034 (PwnKit). Features an optimized exploit with 7 polymorphic payload modes (Interactive Shell, Backdoor, User Creation, Reverse Shell, etc). Portfolio piece focused on memory corruption logic, environment variable manipulation, and anti-forensic techniques.

update.name: CVE-2026-52217-VTEX-Checkout-CrossTenant-IDOR
update.description: The VTEX Checkout Service exposes OrderForm data through the endpoints `/api/checkout/pub/orderForm/{orderFormId}` and `/attachments/*`. These endpoints do not validate the tenant (store account) of the authenticated session against the ownership of the requested OrderForm.
